title: Senior Radiologist at AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd:
AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
